full_text:
Dissociated with 20 ml of AdFF containing 1U/mL dispase

Cell count 1):

total: 3.6 E7

live: 1.55 E7

viability: 42.9 %

size: 8 um

Cell count 2):

total: 4 E7

live: 1.52 E7

viability: 37.5 %

size: 7.6 um

Total cell count: 3.8 E7 / mL

Total volume: 1 mL

A) FFPE sample (4 drops) + Flow organoid (16 drops) + single-cell sequencing (8 drops):

48-well plate

flow + SC: 28 wells x 40 µl x = 1120 µl → round up to 1500 uL

1000 cells/µl = 1.5E6

→ make 2 x 1.5 ml eppendorfs, 750 µl each

→ 1000 cells/µl = 0.75 E6

volume to take from cell suspension: 20 µl

ORG full medium → 559.5 µl

ome-gel → 106 µl

aprotinin → 2.25 µl

thrombin → 2.25 µl

fibrinogen → 15 µl

→ Let it solidify for 60 min - add 350 uL medium

B) Drug treatment for IF:

384-well plate

384 wells x 20 µl = 7680 µl

Leave outer wells empty = in total plate 308 wells

prepare the mix for 384 wells 1000 cells/µl = 7.7E6 cells

→ make 4 x of 920 µl omegel plus cells mixture in a tube and 1000 ul medium in a reservoir

→ 1000 cells/µl = 7.7 E6

volume to take from cell suspension: 53 µl

ORG full medium → 527 µl

ome-gel → 270 µl

aprotinin → 5.8 µl

thrombin → 5.8 µl

fibrinogen → 38 µl

→ Let it solidify for 60 min - add 25 µl medium

→ Next day add drugs using Tecan drug dispenser

E) Sample for flow

→ Collect 1. e6 cells for flow cytometry for unstained control and antibody stain for functional marker analysis in immune cells

F) Remaining cells were frozen in stem cell banker as 1 E7 *2 vials

plate (1): For Flow & FFPE

Drops plated on 48 well suspension culture plates (CellStar, #677102)

Next day:

Cultures:

Cultures had some multicellular clusters, all looking very healthy. Some small debris also, but not too much to harm the cultures.

Treatment:

NOTE! New STINGa concentrations were used: 0.01 - 0.025 - 0.1 - 1 uM. (Instead of the old 0.1 - 0.4 - 0.7 - 1 uM). The new concentrations were given by GSK people in October 2022. Since then we have not had any new 384-well plates to treat. The old concentrations were given by GSK people in December 2021.

Pembrolizumab was freshly diluted to 3.0 mg/ mL in 0.3% Tween-20:

c1v1 = c2v2 (for diluting Pembro)

5.0 mg/mL x v1 = 3.0 mg /mL x 25 uL

v1 = 15 uL

---

c1v1 = c2v2 (for diluting tween-20)

100 % of tween-20 x v1 = 0.75% x 10 mL of PBS (excess amount is prepared due to the viscosity of tween-20; use the mixture within 1 month).

v1 = 75 uL

--

=> 15 uL of 5.0 mg /mL Pembro + 10 uL of 0.75% tween-20 in PBS = 25 uL of 3.0 mg/mL Pembro in 0.3% tween-20

--

Drops were fixed after 4 days in culture. Samples on the 384 well plate were first stained with live-or-dye staining before fixing with 4% PFA for 40 mins. Cells were then stained with Hoechst, CK7 (568nm) and CD45 (647 nm)

End point: Day 7 ( day 6 treatment)

On day 7 (6 days post treatment) cells from 384 wells were stained with LiVE/DYE marker and fixed according to the protocol.

From 48 wells, 10 wells were processed for flow cytometry (control sample) and remaining wells (20 wells) were processed for SC sequencing. Briefly, cells and the matrix was dissociated with dispase (30min at 370) as done for flow cytometry, harvested from the wells. Centrifuged at *400 g for 6 min at +4. Pellet was frozen in 1 ml of stem cell banker, and the tube was kept in -80 in a freezing box.

Reagent | Stock concentration | Working concentration | Ratio
Omentum gel | 17.7 mg/mL | 2.5 mg/mL | 0.141
Aprotinin | 10 mg/mL | 33.3 ug/mL | 0.003
Thrombin | 100 U | 0.3 U | 0.003
Fibrinogen | 25 ug/mL | 0.5 ug/mL | 0.02

Flow (ab stain) | Flow (ab stain) | Flow (no stain) | SC | SC | | | 
Flow (ab stain) | Flow (ab stain) | Flow (no stain) | SC | SC | | | 
Flow (ab stain) | Flow (no stain) | SC | SC | SC | | | 
Flow (ab stain) | Flow (no stain) | SC | SC | SC | | |
